title: rubus elongatifolius
intro: Rubus elongatifolius, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rubus elongatifolius include its potential to help manage diabetes, lower cholesterol levels, and exhibit anti-cancer properties, making it a promising natural remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Rubus elongatifolius can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support digestive health and immune function.
